name: bookbridge-monorepo
description: BookBridge — book donation platform for Georgian highland schools

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix admin install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,frontend,admin -c green,cyan,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix admin run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix admin run build
